37.reason: [Incorrectly increments both segments' counts when merging; this double-counts segments and breaks the logic of tracking continuous chains]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Incorrectly increments both segments' counts when merging; this double-counts segments and breaks the logic of tracking continuous chains]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Incorrectly increments both segments' counts when merging; should only extend one direction and avoid double-counting]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This double-counting logic is flawed: when two segments connect, both are incremented, leading to overcounting. Also, modifying both segments corrupts future connections.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.25 , reason:  [Incorrectly incrementing cnt[j] breaks the count logic. When merging segments, only one of the segments should absorb the other; incrementing both double-counts shared segments and corrupts the chain length.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.25 , reason:  [Double counting: both segments increment each other's count, leading to inflated counts]
